caption: Initial panoramic radiograph showing a solitary oval, well-defined, radiopaque mass (white arrow), 13 mm×11 mm in size, abutting with the inferior border of the left angle of the mandible.
Lemos asymmetry analysis performed on patient with normal occlusion.
Postoperative radiograph with proper alignment of teeth

Left parotid gland sialography of patient 2 shows sialodochitis with sialadenitis. The Stensen duct exhibits dilatation with local strictures showing sausage-string structures. The intraglandular ductules also show irregular dilatation.
A panoramic radiograph shows an osteolytic lesion in the left posterior maxilla, with resorption of the hard palate and the floor of the maxillary sinus.
